odb: dbTypes API uniformity odb: dbTypes API uniformity REQUEST FOR FEEDBACK  (hence draft)

In working on language bindings for other languages these things came up

There are a number of matters in the one commit (please advise if you want commit broken up) :

Typo corrections
Renaming variables that were copy-and-paste but whose name is now a poor choice
Completely incorrect type naming use in command (due to copy-and-paste error)


More major concerns:

Discrepancies between the
